subject: ENGLISH
title: Identify roots of high frequency words (nouns,
objective: Identify roots of high frequency words (nouns, verbs, and
introduction: Every good reader knows some words by heart — like magic! ✨ In today's lesson, 'Identify roots of high frequency words', you'll practice reading words instantly. Ready to become a word wizard?

vocabulary.definition: A common word you recognize instantly without sounding out.
A word that shows action, like 'run', 'eat', or 'sing'.
